_comment: Rosie MCP server for Claude Desktop. Copy this block into your Claude Desktop config and restart Claude Desktop. On macOS the file lives at: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (Windows: %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json). Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/rosie with the absolute path to your local rosie checkout. Doctrine v11 LOCKED 749/14/163 @ c7c0ba17 | Lambda = Conjecture 1 (NOT a theorem). Speaks the real MCP stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 transport (rev 2025-06-18): initialize -> tools/list -> tools/call. 12 live tools route to the SZLHOLDINGS organ mesh; safety-critical tools require a 3-of-4 Byzantine quorum. Honest: a tool result reflects the REAL organ response/error, never a fabricated success.
